message:
test(testkit): Add policy simulation integration tests

Add integration tests for policy simulation utilities:

tests/policy_simulation.rs:
- Test PolicySimulationInput parsing
- Validate simulation output structure
- Test error cases (missing claims, invalid principals)
- Verify deterministic simulation results

Cargo.toml:
- Add test dependencies for integration tests

These tests ensure the testkit's policy simulation helpers produce
correct and consistent results across different input scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
